    12	export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13	  snapshot: string
    14	  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15	}
    16	
    17	const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18	
    19	const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    20	  dismiss: () => void
    21	  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    22	  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    23	  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    24	  onSave: (ref: string) => void

    39	  useEffect(() => {
    40	    return () => {
    41	      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    42	    }
    43	  }, [])
    44	
    45	  const handleMount = useCallback(
    46	    (editor: any) => {
    47	      editorRef.current = editor
    48	      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    49	      editor.store.listen(
    50	        () => {
    51	          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)

    54	              const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()

    66	      )

    69	  )
    70

    86	    }

    95	        onClick={handleClose}
    96	      >
    97	        <X size={20} />
    98	      </button>
    99	      <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   100	    </>
   101	  )
   102	}

     8	import * as css from './styles.css'

    10	
    11	export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12	  snapshot: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	export const TldrawStaticRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16	  snapshot,
    17	}) => {
    18	  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20	  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21	
    22	  useEffect(() => {
    23	    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24	    const target = containerRef.current
    25	    if (!target) return
    26	
    27	    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28	      (entries) => {
    29	        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30	          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31	          observer.disconnect()
    32	        }
    33	      },
    34	      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35	    )
    36	    observer.observe(target)
    37	    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38	  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39	
    40	  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41	    return (
    42	      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43	        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44	      </div>
    45	    )
    46	  }
    47	
    48	  return (
    49	    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50	      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51	    </div>
    52	  )
    53	}
    54	
    55	// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---

    70	    }}
    71	  />
    72	)

   108	      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
